core_mechanism: surrogate-model (emulator) accelerated Bayesian inference: an interpolating emulator is trained on a grid of expensive forward simulations spanning a parameter space, and the posterior over those parameters is sampled by Markov Chain Monte Carlo to derive an upper bound
brief_reason: The abstract runs a suite of forward simulations across a parameter range, trains an emulator on them, and then uses an MCMC analysis to turn observed data into a 95% C.L. upper limit on the interaction-strength parameter.
